name: slide
title: slide
description: A directional slide between two scenes — only the incoming scene translates, the outgoing stays in place. Wraps Remotion's `slide()` with Onda's directional vocabulary (`left` / `right` / `up` / `down`). Pair with the recommended Onda timing for the house feel.
pickWhen: incoming scene arrives from a direction while outgoing stays put — modal overlay, list item entering. Use `push` for both panes.
